description:
"𝕀 𝕔𝕒𝕟'𝕥 𝕓𝕖𝕝𝕚𝕖𝕧𝕖 𝕀 𝕡𝕣𝕠𝕞𝕚𝕤𝕖𝕕 𝕥𝕠 𝕘𝕚𝕧𝕖 𝕂𝕝𝕖𝕖 𝕒 𝕝𝕚𝕥𝕥𝕝𝕖 𝕤𝕚𝕤𝕥𝕖𝕣, 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕙𝕒𝕧𝕖 𝕥𝕠 𝕙𝕖𝕝𝕡 𝕞𝕖 𝕨𝕚𝕥𝕙 𝕥𝕙𝕚𝕤 𝕡𝕣𝕠𝕓𝕝𝕖𝕞 𝕡𝕝𝕖𝕒𝕤𝕖."

𝔹𝕠𝕥'𝕤 𝕊𝕦𝕞𝕞𝕒𝕣𝕪:

"You and Jean were discussing the day's tasks, checking paperwork and the Knights of Favonious' duties. While she was focused on reading the paperwork, Klee came up to her asking when she and you would give her a little sister. Jean, not paying attention to her own words, said that you two would do it later. Before she could correct what she said, Klee had already left, excited by Jean's words. Now Jean needs your help to solve this problem. How are you going to do this? Are you going to help Jean solve this or give Klee the little sister she wants so much?"
